# Morning Digest - Tuesday, May 19, 2026

## Emails Needing Attention

WARNING: Microsoft 365 connector is not authenticated - email data could not be retrieved for this run. Please re-authenticate the MS365 plugin in Cowork settings so future runs can pull live data.

## Teams - Active Conversations

WARNING: Microsoft Teams data unavailable - same authentication issue as above. No chat messages could be retrieved.

## Today's Agenda

WARNING: Calendar data unavailable - Microsoft 365 connector requires re-authentication. Check your Outlook calendar directly for today's meetings.

## Immediate Action

Action required: The MS365 plugin needs to be re-authenticated. Open Cowork, go to Settings > Plugins > Microsoft 365, and reconnect your account. Once done, tomorrow's digest will include live email, Teams, and calendar data.

No immediate blockers from data sources - you are clear to focus, but please reconnect MS365 today.
note: MS365 connector requires re-authentication. Data will be live once reconnected.
